title: xanthocephalum tenue
intro: Xanthocephalum tenue, also known as the slender xanthocephalum, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Xanthocephalum tenue include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Xanthocephalum tenue are typically made from the plant's leaves and flowers, and can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions.
